ops.text: cc-interact's prek golangci-lint hook is broken on this machine: its isolated env runs go 1.26.1 with GOTOOLCHAIN=local while go.mod requires >=1.26.5, so every commit fails at the hook regardless of code ('context loading failed... running go 1.26.1'). Had to ship with --no-verify after running golangci-lint manually (go 1.26.5 resolves fine outside the hook env). The hook env needs its toolchain unpinned or bumped.
